CustomField.description: This field will signify that when the Sample is Rejected by the lab, a new test will be auto-shipped out. If this is unchecked, then the Lab Order will stay in rejected status, and a PSR will need to manage this manually.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this box to allow this lab provider to auto reship when the lab rejects the test
CustomField.label: Auto Reship on Rejection
